info.title: Rhytmiq API
info.description: FIG-compliant API for managing rhythmic gymnastics meets

post.description:
Check that district exists before attempting an insert
This will allow a meaningful error message (404) rather
than a generic 500 from the DB if the district_id is invalid.

get.description: List all clubs, optionally filtered by district_id

parameters.name: district_id

schema.description: Optional district_id to filter clubs by district
schema.title: District Id

parameters.description: Optional district_id to filter clubs by district

delete.description: Delete a club by ID. If the club has gymnasts or coaches, the DB will raise an IntegrityError.

post.description:
Check that club exists before attempting an insert
This will allow a meaningful error message (404) rather
than a generic 500 from the DB if the club_id is invalid.

get.description: List all coaches, optionally filtered by club_id

parameters.name: club_id

schema.description: Optional club_id to filter coaches by club
schema.title: Club Id

parameters.description: Optional club_id to filter coaches by club

schema.title: Response List Meet Entries Meet Entries  Get
Response List Routine Profiles Routine Profiles  Get

get.description: List all judges, optionally filtered by country_code

parameters.name: country_code

schema.description: Optional country_code to filter judges by country
schema.title: Country Code

parameters.description: Optional country_code to filter judges by country

post.description:
Create a new judge score.

Design notes:
- Which panels are legal depends on the routine's level band (see
  app.scoring.profile_for_level): levels 1-3 accept only `final`, levels 4-7 accept
  `difficulty_body` and `execution`, levels 8+ accept the full D/A/E set. A mark on
  a panel outside that set is rejected with a 422, since the payload is invalid for
  that routine's level, not merely in conflict with existing data.
- Known limitation: this level/panel gate only runs at this HTTP API boundary, since
  it needs a cross-table join (routine -> entry -> level) that a Postgres CHECK
  constraint can't express. Direct ORM writes (test factories, future seed/admin
  scripts) bypass it entirely, unlike ck_judge_score_panel_value_cap which is a real
  DB constraint enforced everywhere.

schema.title: Response List Judge Scores Judge Scores  Get
Response List Penalty Records Penalty Records  Get

rank.title: Rank
rank.description: Competition rank within this all-around category.

entry_id.title: Entry Id
entry_id.description: The meet entry this row represents.

competitor_name.title: Competitor Name
competitor_name.description: Gymnast full name, or group name.

bib_number.title: Bib Number
bib_number.description: Bib number of the competing entry.

total.title: Total
total.description: Sum of this entry's routine totals.

e_total.title: E Total
e_total.description: Sum of this entry's routine Execution scores.

routines_counted.title: Routines Counted
routines_counted.description: Number of routines summed -- less than the full apparatus count means a partial (in-progress or incomplete) all-around.

medal.title: Medal
medal.description: Standard-based medal tier from the meet's configured cutoffs (Meet.medal_gold_min/medal_silver_min), independent of rank. Null if the meet isn't using cutoffs.

provisional.title: Provisional
provisional.description: True unless the meet's status is 'completed'.

age_group.description: Age group filter applied, if any.

AllAroundStandingsRead.title: AllAroundStandingsRead
AllAroundStandingsRead.description: Live-computed all-around ranking for one meet/level/age_group slice.

rank.title: Rank
rank.description: Competition rank within this apparatus category.

entry_id.title: Entry Id
entry_id.description: The meet entry this routine belongs to.

competitor_name.title: Competitor Name
competitor_name.description: Gymnast full name, or group name.

bib_number.title: Bib Number
bib_number.description: Bib number of the competing entry.

final_score.title: Final Score
final_score.description: Levels 1-3 only: the single pre-aggregated mark out of 13. 0 at every other level, where the score is built from the D/A/E panels instead.

medal.title: Medal
medal.description: Standard-based medal tier from the meet's configured cutoffs (Meet.medal_gold_min/medal_silver_min), independent of rank. Null if the meet isn't using cutoffs.

provisional.title: Provisional
provisional.description: True unless the meet's status is 'completed'.

age_group.description: Age group filter applied, if any.

ApparatusStandingsRead.title: ApparatusStandingsRead
ApparatusStandingsRead.description: Live-computed per-apparatus ranking for one meet/level/age_group/apparatus slice.

Ethnicity.title: Ethnicity
Ethnicity.description:
South African statutory demographic categories, plus an explicit decline option.

NULL and `prefer_not_to_say` are different states: NULL means the question was
never asked or the answer is unknown, `prefer_not_to_say` means the gymnast was
asked and declined. Adding a value here later needs a hand-written
`ALTER TYPE ethnicity ADD VALUE ...` migration -- autogenerate will not see it.
